channel.title: Cisco on Christopher Hannan
channel.description: Recent content in Cisco on Christopher Hannan

item.title: Using Ansible to update the management ACL of IOS, IOS-XR and NX-OS devices
item.description: Using Ansible to update the management ACL (access-list) on Cisco IOS, IOS-XR and NX-OS devices Scenario: You have a large brownfield environment that is a mixture of Cisco IOS, IOS-XR and NX-OS devices. The configuration of these devices has been previously managed manually and as such, there is no standard configuration. Each of the operating systems has a slightly different syntax for making changes and each device’s access-list for management access could be any name or number and be either a standard or extended access-list.
